apps.app_name: Open and transparent management of personal information
apps.recommended_language:
RECOMMENDED: "We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy sets out how
we collect, use, disclose, and manage personal information in accordance with the Australian
Privacy Act 1988 (Cth)."
Review APP 2 (Anonymity and pseudonymity) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 3 (Collection of solicited personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 4 (Dealing with unsolicited personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

apps.app_name: Notification of the collection of personal information
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 5 (Notification of the collection of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

apps.app_name: Use or disclosure of personal information
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 6 (Use or disclosure of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 7 (Direct marketing) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 8 (Cross-border disclosure of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

apps.app_name: Adoption, use or disclosure of government related identifiers
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 9 (Adoption, use or disclosure of government related identifiers) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 10 (Quality of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 11 (Security of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 12 (Access to personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
Review APP 13 (Correction of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

adm_check.recommendation: From 10 December 2026, if you use automated decision-making with legal or similarly significant effect (e.g., credit scoring, eligibility decisions), you must disclose: (1) the use of automated systems; (2) how they work; (3) personal information used; (4) the significant effect; (5) mechanism to request human review; and (6) right to object.

next_steps: CRITICAL: Conduct urgent privacy policy review and update
Engage privacy consultant or lawyer with Privacy Act expertise
Prepare for 10 December 2026 ADM transparency requirement
